evals.expected_output: Agent reads the plan file, validates all sections are present, marks it in_progress, implements the divide function with exact signature from the plan, adds doc comment, writes tests for success and division-by-zero cases, runs cargo fmt/clippy/test/check, fixes any failures, performs zero-gap check, marks plan completed, and updates INDEX.md.

Agent detects sdd/plans/INDEX.md exists, reads it to find the first in_progress or next pending plan (with dependencies satisfied), resumes or starts that plan, implements all deliverables, runs verification, and marks it complete. If all plans are already completed, reports completion.

evals.prompt: Execute the next plan for my project
evals.expected_output: Agent reads INDEX.md, identifies the next pending plan whose dependencies are all completed, validates the plan file, marks it in_progress, implements deliverables one by one following the plan exactly, runs the full verification suite, performs zero-gap check, marks complete, updates INDEX.md, and suggests the next plan to execute.
